contracts.name: No Competitor Mentions
contracts.description: Never mention competitor banks by name

contracts.name: Language Match
contracts.description: Response should be in the same language as the user's message

contracts.name: Positive Tone
contracts.description: Maintain a positive or neutral tone

contracts.name: Banking Topics Only
contracts.description: Responses should only discuss banking and finance topics

contracts.name: No Specific Financial Advice
contracts.description: Must not provide specific investment or financial advice
contracts.assertion: The response does not provide specific investment recommendations, stock picks, or personalized financial advice. General information about banking products is acceptable.
